task: Compute retained loss after reinsurance at PML 1-in-50, 1-in-100, and 1-in-250; compute retained loss ratios versus premium; flag if retained 1-in-100 loss ratio > 200%. Produce a QA spreadsheet (cat_model_QA.xlsx) and an underwriting note (underwriting_note.md). Include intermediate calculations, validation checks, uncertainty and sensitivity notes, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. The response must be executable from the embedded packet alone, with no external data lookup required beyond standard interpretation of the cited public-removed context.
